title: Dutch court raises penalties on Meta if non-profiling feeds don’t stick
summary_full: Appeals court says Meta must apply DSA changes ordered last year on Dutch users' Instagram and Facebook timelines urgently – or face higher fines
summary_public: Appeals court says Meta must apply DSA changes ordered last year on Dutch users' Instagram and Facebook timelines urgently – or face higher fines
